title: Context Engineering from Scratch
description: The art and science of filling the context window with the right information.

pods.title: Context Engineering for LLMs
pods.description: The art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step

pods.title: Prompt Design Principles
pods.description: Master the science of steering LLMs through system prompts, few-shot learning, chain-of-thought reasoning, structured output, and prompt chaining.

pods.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Systems
pods.description: Build RAG systems from first principles — from chunking and embeddings to hybrid retrieval, reranking, and end-to-end evaluation with RAGAS.

pods.title: Memory Architectures for LLM Applications
pods.description: How to give your LLM the ability to remember — from simple buffers to hybrid long-term memory systems.

pods.title: Context Optimization & Evaluation
pods.description: How to compress, budget, measure, and continuously improve the information you feed your LLM — from token budgeting and prompt compression to RAGAS evaluation, A/B testing, and production monitoring.
